title: Korak 6

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Statistics Calculator

Enter a list of comma-separated numbers.

The mean of a list of numbers is the average, calculated by taking the sum of all numbers and dividing that by the count of numbers.

Mean:

The median of a list of numbers is the number that appears in the middle of the list, when sorted from least to greatest.

Median:

The mode of a list of numbers is the number that appears most often in the list.

Mode:

The range of a list of numbers is the difference between the largest and smallest numbers in the list.

Range:

The variance of a list of numbers measures how far the values are from the mean, on average.

Variance:

The standard deviation of a list of numbers is the square root of the variance.

Standard Deviation:

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Vaša funkcija za calculate treba da ima razliku od filtered.
Vaša funkcija za calculate treba da koristi metodu .filter() u redovima numbers.
Trebalo bi da postaviš rezultate iz numbers.filter() u razliku od filtered.

description:
Korisnik može uneti bilo koji tekst u polje za unos. Želite da osigurate da radite samo sa brojevima. Komponenta Number() će vratiti NaN (što znači "nije broj") ako vrednost koja se prosleđuje ne može biti konvertovana u broj.

Treba vam da filtrirate ove vrednosti – srećom, DataFrames imaju specijalni način da to urade. Metoda .filter() će vam omogućiti da filtrirate elemente iz DataFrame-a i kreirate novi okvir za taj proces.

Deklariši varijablu filtered i postavi vrednost numbers.filter() unutar nje.
